transcript: All right, so, um, about my day, it was like, I wake up in the morning about 10:00 a.m. and then I, um, did some stretching and some exercises and then, um, I started my work until like 1:00 p.m. and, you know, it was like focused time when I worked on my article. Then I ate my dinner and went back to work for another session. And now here we are.

issues.evidence: I wake up in the morning
issues.fix: I woke up in the morning
Try to reduce the use of filler words to improve flow
The 'e' in 'exercises' should be pronounced more clearly as /ɛk.sər.saɪ.zɪz/
The 't' in 'article' should be a clear /t/ or a flap /ɾ/ sound

strengths: Good use of transition words like 'then' and 'and now'
